<svg width="800" height="600" viewBox="0 0 800 600" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <rect width="800" height="600" fill="#000"/>
  <g transform="translate(400,300)">
    <!-- Flower petals -->
    <circle cx="0" cy="-150" r="50" fill="url(#grad1)" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="2"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="-100" r="50" fill="url(#grad2)" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="2"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="-50" r="50" fill="url(#grad3)" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="2"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="-100" r="50" fill="url(#grad2)" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="2"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="50" fill="url(#grad4)" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="2"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="50" r="50" fill="url(#grad5)" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="2"/>
    
    <!-- Flower center -->
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="30" fill="#ff0000" stroke="#ff0000" stroke-width="2"/>
    
    <!-- Graduated gradients -->
    <defs>
      <linearGradient id="grad1" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="0%">
        <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#ffffff;stop-opacity:1"/>
        <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#ffffff;stop-opacity:0.9"/>
      </linearGradient>
      
      <linearGradient id="grad2" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="0%">
        <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#ffffff;stop-opacity:1"/>
        <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#ffffff;stop-opacity:0.8"/>
      </linearGradient>
      
      <linearGradient id="grad3" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="0%">
        <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#ffffff;stop-opacity:1"/>
        <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#ffffff;stop-opacity:0.7"/>
      </linearGradient>
      
      <linearGradient id="grad4" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="0%">
        <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#ffffff;stop-opacity:1"/>
        <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#ffffff;stop-opacity:0.6"/>
      </linearGradient>
      
      <linearGradient id="grad5" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="0%">
        <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#ffffff;stop-opacity:1"/>
        <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#ffffff;stop-opacity:0.5"/>
      </linearGradient>
    </defs>
  </g>
</svg>

<svg width="200" height="200" viewBox="0 0 200 200" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

    <!-- Petals -->
    <path d="M 80 0 Q 95 -15 110 0 L 110 0 Q 125 5 140 0 Z" fill="#fff" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2"/>
    <path d="M -80 0 Q -95 -15 -110 0 L -110 0 Q -125 5 -140 0 Z" fill="#fff" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2"/>
    <path d="M 0 -80 Q -15 -95 0 -110 L 0 -110 Q 5 -125 0 -140 Z" fill="#fff" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2"/>
    <path d="M 0 80 Q 15 95 0 110 L 0 110 Q -5 125 0 140 Z" fill="#fff" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2"/>
    
    <!-- Inner petals -->
    <path d="M 60 0 Q 70 -10 80 0 L 80 0 Q 90 5 100 0 Z" fill="#ff0000" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2"/>
    <path d="M -60 0 Q -70 -10 -80 0 L -80 0 Q -90 5 -100 0 Z" fill="#ff0000" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2"/>
    <path d="M 0 -60 Q -10 -70 0 -80 L 0 -80 Q 5 -90 0 -100 Z" fill="#ff0000" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2"/>
    <path d="M 0 60 Q 10 70 0 80 L 0 80 Q -5 90 0 100 Z" fill="#ff0000" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2"/>
  </g>
